title: Ultramarine Totem of Undying
description: Space marine ultramarine from warhammer 40,000 totem of undying
body:
Space marine ultramarine from warhammer 40,000 totem of undying, It is curious how there were no totems of space marines, so I had to make this one and decided to share it.
The archive is made for the 1.18 version, but it works just as fine for later versions, there is no need to change it in any way
